reviews.review_description: I’d not have given it any stars if I knew how not to. Couldn’t even create an account to be able to use the app. Awful interface. Confusing. No clear instructions. Not user friendly whatsoever. It’s a reason why this is a free app that comes with the headset. 😂

They make it very hard and confusing to get an account and start actually using it I only got this app to see where a new price of furniture might fit and was stuck for 30 minutes trying to get in. This would have been 1 star but I didn’t actually get to see how good the modeling was since I couldn’t get passed the first screen.

reviews.review_title: lol terrible do not get this
reviews.review_description: No real use for it and the engine it runs on is absolutely terrible and just causes constant bugs and overall clunkiness to the whole aesthetic and functionality as a whole.

developer_response.body:
Perhaps you just haven't scanned your room.
Please scan the room with Quest before using it.
